## 🎯 Pull Request Summary

<!-- Provide a brief description of changes -->

## 📋 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔐 Security fix
- [ ] 🤖 Automated PR (bot-generated)

## 🔐 Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or credentials included in code
- [ ] All environment variables documented
- [ ] DRY_RUN defaults verified (if applicable)
- [ ] Bot pings are opt-in (if applicable)
- [ ] Scripts marked executable (if applicable)
- [ ] Dependencies reviewed and audited
- [ ] No breaking changes to security features
- [ ] Safe defaults maintained

## 🧪 Testing

- [ ] Tested locally in dry-run mode
- [ ] Tested locally in live mode (if applicable)
- [ ] SmartBrain orchestrator tests passed
- [ ] CI/CD workflow validated
- [ ] Logs reviewed for errors
- [ ] Artifacts generated successfully (if applicable)

## 📊 SmartBrain Bot Metadata

<!-- For bot-generated PRs, include: -->

**Bot Run Details:**
- Run ID: <!-- e.g., 12345 -->
- Timestamp: <!-- ISO 8601 format -->
- Configuration:

  - BOT_PINGS_ENABLED: <!-- true/false -->
  - Repository: <!-- owner/repo -->

**Scan Results:**
- Contracts found: <!-- count -->
- Security issues: <!-- count -->
- Audit status: <!-- passed/failed/warnings -->

## 🔍 Audit Artifacts

<!-- Attach or link to audit artifacts if available -->

- [ ] Scan logs: `logs/scan-*.json`
- [ ] Audit logs: `logs/audit-*.json`
- [ ] Health check: `logs/health-*.json`
- [ ] Deployment artifacts: `build/talents.json`
- [ ] Bot summary: `node/logs/summary.json`

**Artifact Links:**
- GitHub Actions artifacts: <!-- link to workflow run -->
- Build artifacts: <!-- path or link -->
